name: A Beacon Beckons
objective_notes: Add 'Large Collidable Objects' to your overview or the Damsel wreck won't appear; no combat.

name: Agent Inquiry
objective_notes: Click the agent NPC in space (not the beacon) and use the audio/interact icon to complete.

name: Of Interest
objective_notes: Three sequential waves — each triggered by killing the last ship of the previous wave; loot the Strange Datacore (0.1 m³).

name: Retrieving Red
objective_notes: Red's body auto-appears in your cargo after killing all ships; no manual loot step needed.

name: Jet-Canning a Janitor
objective_notes: Centrien's Shuttle item only drops from the final reinforcement ship — don't leave early.

name: Chivvying a Chef
objective_notes: Combat is optional — you can retrieve Chef Azil without killing any drones; two waves spawn on approach.

name: Delivering a Doctor
objective_notes: Load 'A Lot of Money' (3 m³) before undocking; deliver it to the Dead Drop container — do not shoot it or the ransom is destroyed.

name: Engineering a Rescue
objective_notes: No combat required — just loot Engineer Karin (1 m³) from the wreck; killing initial drones triggers a second wave at 5–10 km.

name: Studying the Scene
objective_notes: Three broken recon drones orbit near the container but are non-hostile — ignore them and loot the Corrupted Drone Components (1 m³).

name: Rendering Assistance
objective_notes: Deliver Antibiotics (0.2 m³) by opening the Colonial Supply Depot container and transferring in — warp-in is 45 km from it.

name: Lair of the Snakes
objective_notes: Killing both destroyers in wave 2 triggers wave 3 and the Personnel Transport; expect sensor dampening throughout.

name: Data Retrieval
objective_notes: Container is unlocked — you can grab the data core without fighting; engaging spawns two reinforcement waves including a cruiser.

name: Passive Observation
objective_notes: Do NOT shoot anything — drones and Caldari Navy ships are passive; mission completes when you approach within ~10 km of the Drone Hive.

name: An Economy Under Threat
objective_notes: Requires at least 150 m³ free cargo space for the farming supplies; drones ignore you if unprovoked.

name: Royal Jelly
objective_notes: Need 15 m³ free cargo for 15 FR Personnel; Habitation Module spawns ~80 km out — prioritize speed/MWD over firepower.

name: Nature Pictures
objective_notes: Pick up Encoded Data Transmission (50 m³) — ensure 50 m³ free cargo before departing.

name: Tracking or Scanning
objective_notes: Permanent path choice: 'Tracking' (Gallente/Mordu's Legion path, ids 109–111) vs 'Scanning' (Caldari/Serpentis path, id 108). Cannot be undone.

name: Tracking the Queen (Part 1)
objective_notes: Loot Corin Risia (1 m³) from the container ~45 km out; picking it up spawns 7 Mordu frigates, one with a stasis web at 20 km.

name: Tracking the Queen (Part 2)
objective_notes: Manually move Corin Risia (1 m³) from station Items to your cargo hold before undocking — easy to forget.

name: Tracking the Queen (Part 3)
objective_notes: Deliver Drone Tracking Data to a jet can; 6 Mordu frigates spawn on arrival (one webs at 10 km). Losing the data to destruction costs standings.

name: Planting the Body
objective_notes: Placing the body in the Hideout container triggers 12 defenders immediately then 4 more frigates + 1 cruiser; burn in fast and warp out.

name: Chasing a Nightmare
objective_notes: Follow Wolf Burgan's on-screen prompts through 1 acceleration gate then 3 Spatial Rift gates; remote-complete after the second drone sighting.
